children.text: Make sure your smartphone and PC are both connected to the same Wi-Fi network.
PowerDVD Remote works with the below retail PowerDVD versions:

PowerDVD Live
PowerDVD 16, 15, 14, 13 (All retail versions)
PowerDVD 12 (Ultra only)
PowerDVD 11 (Ultra and Deluxe)

Don't have PowerDVD?
Visit the below link to get a 30 day free trial.
Tap to go back to previous window.
Same as Info button on most remotes.
Tap to accept the selected option (same as Enter button). Drag on this area to navigate through the menu.
Tap to select audio languages or subtitles.
Tap on this area to play/pause PowerDVD playback. Drag on this area to jump forward/backward, or to adjust the volume.
